narrative:
Washington Twp township has 998 registered voters, with 50.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.8 percentage points.
